top_signals.title: Watch: Trump speaks at G7 summit after threatening Iran
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said Wednesday at the G7 conference that the U.S. will "go right back to dropping bombs" if he doesn't like the Iran deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Coal prices soar on Indonesia export controls, China mine disaster
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon AI exec predicts first 'commercially useful' quantum computers in 5-7 years
top_signals.summary: Quantum computing is becoming an increasingly competitive field with tech giants like Microsoft, Google and IBM developing the technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
